simple_types.name: JSON_Number_Kind
simple_types.code: type JSON_Number_Kind is (None, JSON_Integer, JSON_Float, Out_Of_Range);

documentation.description:
Format of the number used to represent value. Note, it is only hint in
most cases, implementation may use other format for some reason.

record_types.name: JSON_Number

documentation.description: Return number value as floating point value.
